overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy leading a horse through a narrow rocky canyon at night, illuminated by lantern light. The character steadily progresses through the winding passage as the canyon gradually widens and opens into an expansive desert landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with high cliff walls

agents.ego_description: cowboy leading a horse through the narrow canyon, holding a lantern that illuminates the path ahead

notable_agents.action: paint horse being led by the cowboy, walking steadily along the trail

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left side of the canyon passage
tall rocky cliff face forming the right side of the canyon passage
rocky dirt trail winding through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed canyon passage at night. The cowboy character leads a paint horse along a rocky dirt trail, with steep canyon walls rising closely on both sides. The only light comes from the lantern carried by the character, casting dramatic shadows on the rock faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon passage with gradually receding walls

events.description: canyon walls gradually recede outward and the path widens, revealing more of the starry night sky above

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse forward as the canyon opens up around them, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: horse walking steadily alongside the cowboy through the widening passage

segments.scene_description: As the journey continues, the canyon gradually widens and the towering rock walls recede into the mid-distance. The path remains a rocky dirt trail, but the sense of enclosure lessens as more sky becomes visible overhead. The cowboy and horse maintain their steady progression through the transitioning terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert area at canyon exit with wooden fence line

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into an expansive open desert area, with canyon walls falling away to the sides
wooden fence line becomes visible on the left side of the path in the open terrain

agents.ego_description: leading the horse out of the canyon into the open desert, approaching a wooden fence line

notable_agents.action: horse walking beside the cowboy in the open desert terrain

entered.detail: wooden fence line running parallel to the path on the left side
expansive open desert landscape stretching into the distance under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the transition from enclosed canyon to open desert. The canyon walls fall away completely, revealing a vast open landscape under the night sky. A wooden fence line appears on the left, marking the edge of the trail as the cowboy and horse emerge into the expansive terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rocky canyon that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit desert landscape. It begins in a narrow passage where a cowboy leads a paint horse along a dirt trail, with steep walls rising closely on both sides and a lantern casting dramatic shadows. As the journey continues, the towering rock walls slowly recede into the mid-distance, allowing more of the night sky to become visible overhead. The scene then expands as the canyon walls fall away completely, shifting the environment from an enclosed corridor to an expansive open terrain. Finally, the camera follows the pair as they emerge into the wide desert, passing a wooden fence line that marks the edge of the trail.
